title: PM Schema V2 UI Cross-Surface Integration Spec
objective: Reconcile the completed bounded prototype surfaces from UI-001 through UI-004 into one governed cross-surface integration specification before runtime implementation begins, without implementing code, reopening PM schema design, bypassing the governed mutation seam, or broadening into billing or executive workflow design.
constrained_outputs: One planning handoff note that reconciles UI-001 through UI-004 into a single cross-surface integration spec
One route and state handoff map covering field, lead, PM approval, and adjacent planning context
One mutation-seam and offline/online integration contract across the completed prototypes
Implementation-readiness criteria and explicit integration non-goals with no runtime code
validation_steps: Confirm packet UI-005 remains bounded to cross-surface integration specification and does not implement runtime code, routes, or components
Confirm the packet preserves the governed mutation seam and resolves cross-surface handoffs without inventing direct client write shortcuts
Confirm the packet preserves offline Class A/B handling and online-only Class C/D handling across surfaces
Confirm the packet does not broaden into billing, finance finalization, or executive-ops workflow design
sql_permission_note: Planning only. Packet UI-005 does not authorize PM schema changes, runtime implementation, direct client mutation paths, PM approval decisions beyond already-governed prototypes, or finance-affecting workflow design.
